panels.title: Projection records written (per second)
panels.description: Rate of records projected by each money-path worker: brain_canonical_projector_records_count (raw_parsed -> canonical) and brain_ledger_apar_projection_records_count (canonical -> Ledger). A sustained flatline at zero while lag (panel 2) is rising means the obligation money-path has stalled: obligations are not reaching the Ledger and the §6 gate has nothing to gate (risk R-11).

panels.title: Projection lag (seconds)
panels.description: Age of the oldest record not yet projected, per worker: brain_canonical_projector_lag_seconds (oldest unconsumed raw_parsed) and brain_ledger_apar_projection_lag_seconds (oldest canonical AP/AR row not yet in the Ledger). 0 = no backlog. Sustained high lag is the primary stall signal.

__alerts._comment: Unified-alerting rule definitions for this dashboard (provisioned separately from the panel JSON, mirroring infra/grafana/README.md). Two rules guard the money-path projection pipeline (risk R-11):

rules.name: ProjectionPipelineStalled
rules.summary: A canonical money-path projection worker has stalled (rising lag with no throughput).

rules.name: ProjectionLagHigh
rules.summary: Canonical/Ledger projection lag is elevated; obligations may be reaching the Ledger slowly.
